title: Perepelkin
summary:
Perepelkin is an alternate transcription of the Russian name Perepyolkin.
It can refer to:

Yevgeny Perepyolkin, astronomer
Perepelkin (lunar crater)
Perepelkin (Martian crater)
text:
Perepelkin is an alternate transcription of the Russian name Perepyolkin.
It can refer to:

Yevgeny Perepyolkin, astronomer
Perepelkin (lunar crater)
Perepelkin (Martian crater)
